display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（小小维修兔 v1.9 自动分流修复版）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: hardens per-mirror source recovery for host CSS parser failures by percent-encoding raw SVG data URIs and rewriting state #id selectors to compatible attribute selectors before transient rerender. Full-chain diagnostics now report host CSS parser evidence. Prompt, pools, and Menu QR v2.1 remain unchanged.
